assertions.title: Multiple default tokenlists via env var

steps.action: Start temporary server with DEFAULT_TOKENLISTS containing two comma-separated tokenlist files
steps.expected: Server boots and loads both defaults
steps.observed: Temporary server responded healthy on port 3005 with multi-default config.

steps.action: Call GET /tokenlist on the temporary server
steps.observed: Response returned name 'Default Tokenlists' and tokenlists array with 2 entries: 'QF G5 Test List Alpha' and 'QF G5 Test List Beta'.

steps.expected: Both default sources appear as separate entries
steps.observed: Settings modal showed separate source rows for 'QF G5 Test List Alpha' and 'QF G5 Test List Beta', each with its own enabled toggle.

frictions.description: Port 3004 was already occupied during validation startup.
frictions.resolution: Used alternate port 3005 for isolated validation run.

summary: Validated VAL-TL-003 as pass. With DEFAULT_TOKENLISTS set to two defaults, /tokenlist returned both lists and the settings panel displayed them as distinct default sources with independent toggles.
